title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
